basic_details.job_title: RARI Ranikhet Yoga Therapist Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Regional Ayurveda Research Institute Ranikhet (RARI Ranikhet)
basic_details.short_information: Regional Ayurveda Research Institute Ranikhet (RARI Ranikhet) has published the Yoga Therapist Notification 2026 on its official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Yoga Therapist position. Candidates meeting the age criteria as per Central Government rules for SC/ ST/ OBC/ PH and holding a Degree in Yoga/ Yoga & Naturopathy or a Graduate degree with a 1-year Yoga Diploma along with the prescribed experience and YCB Level-II (Therapy Level) Certificate are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 27-07-2026. Candidates can easily access the official notification PDF and recruitmen

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Yoga/Yoga & Naturopathy (min 55%) with 2 years Yoga Therapy experience, Graduate + 1-year Yoga Diploma (min 55%) with 5 years practical experience, YCB Level II (Therapy Level) Certificate, Demonstration skills in Yogic practices (Skill Test)
qualification.details: Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy with min 55% marks + 2 years experience OR Graduate + 1 year Yoga Diploma (55%) + 5 years experience. YCB Level II (Therapy) Certificate. Skill in Yogic practices.

content_sections.heading: RARI Ranikhet Yoga Therapist Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.regional_ayurveda_research_institute_ran: Degree in Yoga/Yoga & Naturopathy (min 55%) with 2 years Yoga Therapy experience, Graduate + 1-year Yoga Diploma (min 55%) with 5 years practical experience, YCB Level II (Therapy Level) Certificate, Demonstration skills in Yogic practices (Skill Test)

content_sections.heading: RARI Ranikhet Yoga Therapist Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the RARI Ranikhet Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download RARI Ranikhet Yoga Therapist Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy with min 55% marks + 2 years experience OR Graduate + 1 year Yoga Diploma (55%) + 5 years experience. YCB Level II (Therapy) Certificate. Skill in Yogic practices.

content_sections.heading: RARI Ranikhet Yoga Therapist Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: RARI Ranikhet Yoga Therapist Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Yoga Therapist.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Yoga Therapist post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q4. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 27 July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Yoga Therapist post?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 38,000 Per Month.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Degree in Yoga/Yoga & Naturopathy (min 55%) with 2 years experience or Graduate + 1-year Yoga Diploma (min 55%) with 5 years experience, along with a YCB Level-II (Therapy Level) Certificate.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test, Interview, and Skill Test.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the interview venue?
faq.answer: The interview venue is at Regional Ayurveda Research Institute Ranikhet, Uttarakhand, 263645.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).
